reviews.review_description: Skip the head nod. Control better with controller.

I'm not a fan of card games, and this game crashed on my Oculus Go once, after playing for just a few minutes. If you want to score on the leaderboard, it seems you need to be lucky in more than one way...

More randomized voices. Death said a bunch of the same things to me within a few minutes. If it was a bit more randomized that would be great. Either that or add some more sayings. If you love black jack it’s a definite buy.

If you like Blackjack, this game is a cool experience. The "Dead" theme is funny but the dialogue is a bit repetitive and could benefit from variety. Movement tracking to answer YES or NO with your head is a nice touch. I would have liked to be able to select things with the Oculus Go controller, it's always better than "look to select" which I hate. Overall a simple and good game of Blackjack. Just wish there was a little bit more to it.
Very simple really cute app in a darkish sort of way.  Only thing I would like to be able to do is split my bet or double down.
